product_results.title: Nike Mens Running Shoes Running Shoe

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be good quality products that are super comfortable for running and training. They appreciate the good fit and lightweight design. The shoes have a nice look and are designed with attention to detail. Customers also value their versatility and durability.

authors_reviews.title: They’re good
authors_reviews.text: Used them for work. Pretty durable - other models didn’t last as long. Comfortable.
authors_reviews.author: Mike
